name: Banking System
desc: The GUI Banking System is a desktop application built with Java  allowing users to create accounts, deposit, withdraw, and view balances — showcasing GUI design and backend logic integration.

name: Resume Builder
desc: The Resume Builder Project is a web app built with HTML, CSS, and PHP that lets users create and download professional resumes through customizable, easy-to-use templates.

name: 8 Puzzle Game
desc: The 8 Puzzle Game is a Python AI project that solves the classic sliding puzzle using the A* algorithm and Manhattan heuristic, showcasing efficient problem-solving and algorithmic skills.

name: Weatherly Android
desc: Native android app built using Java, XML and Volley dependencies. Provides weather forecast.

name: Ecomerce Website
desc: Full-Stack Ecomerce Website using MERN stack and realtime chat with the help of socket.iO

name: Portfolio Website
desc: Personal Portfolio Website. Don't Need Much Info About It, Just Scroll Down. You're Here Only!
